releaseNotes: v0.39 — See the dollar value of your inventory. New: a Value & ROI summary (under Reports) turns your stock into money — the value you can still send back to the wholesaler for credit, the value already lost to expiry, and the at-risk stock you can still return before it expires. Add a unit cost to any product in the catalog editor (or set a fallback average in Settings) and the numbers fill in; items without a cost are shown honestly as "no cost set," never guessed. Export the whole summary to CSV with a per-product breakdown. Under the hood: the new cost field syncs across your devices and is included in your backups. The auto-updater rolls 0.38.3 -> 0.39.0 on next launch; your data is unchanged. 909 tests passing; three-reviewer pre-release audit, all findings fixed.
